prompt: Blocker setup: tap left hole card (As).
why_v1: Hole-card anchor keeps hand reference stable before range action.
feedback_correct_v1: Correct. As is the hole-card anchor because that blocker removes some strong continues before the raise goes in.
feedback_incorrect_v1: Incorrect. Tap the ace of spades because that left hole card is the blocker that removes some strong continuing hands before you raise.
